dataList.name: Shade of Reflection [Rouge]
dataList.desc:
- The Identities' Attack Skills that are <color=#f8c200>Lust Skills</color> or <color=#f8c200>Skills that inflict Bleed or 'Unique Bleed'</color> deal +25% damage (for E.G.O Skills, deal +100% damage instead)
- Enemies take x1.5 damage from <color=#f8c200>Bleed</color> (rounded down)
- Upon <color=#f8c200>A-Reson.</color>, gain 1 random least-owned E.G.O resource and 1 E.G.O resource of the Affinity used for A-Reson. (2 times per turn)

dataList.name: Shade of Reflection [Bleu]
dataList.desc:
- The Identities' Attack Skills that are <color=#f8c200>Gloom Skills</color> or <color=#f8c200>Skills that inflict Sinking or 'Unique Sinking'</color> deal +25% damage (for E.G.O Skills, deal +100% damage instead)
- Turn Start: Enemies in <color=#f8c200>Panic</color> gain 3 Fragile
- <color=#f8c200>The Finger-faction Identities</color> deal +15% damage to and take -15% damage from enemies

dataList.name: Tribulation
dataList.desc:
- <color=#ff0000>Max HP</color> +25%
- Skills inflict +1 more <color=#ff0000>Bleed Potency, Sinking Potency, Mauled Color [Rouge], and Mauled Color [Bleu]</color>
- If target has <color=#ff0000>Palette Vibrante</color>, Clash Power +2 and Base Power +1
- [Phase 2 exclusive effect] Turn Start: If this unit will use "Burst Forth the Pulsing Crimson under Your Skin" this turn, <color=#ff0000>heal 10 SP on self</color> for every Sinner that has <color=#ff0000>Palette Vibrante</color> (max 30 SP)

dataList.name: Shade of Reflection [The Middle]
dataList.desc:
- Encounter Start: If 4+ <color=#f8c200>The Middle-faction</color> Identities are on the field, activate the following effects:
 · Ricardo's first and second <color=#f8c200>patterns change</color>
 · <color=#f8c200>Gain 2 E.G.O Resources for all Affinities</color>
- Ricardo's Skill effects <color=#f8c200>do not inflict Paralyze</color> on Identities that have <color=#f8c200>equipped Defense Skills</color>
- The Identities' Attack Skills that are <color=#f8c200>Envy</color> Skills or Skills that inflict <color=#f8c200>Bleed or 'Unique Bleed'</color> deal +30% damage (for E.G.O Skills, deal +100% damage instead)
- Combat Start: Upon <color=#f8c200>A-Reson.</color>, gain <color=#f8c200>1 least-owned E.G.O resource 4 times</color>

dataList.name: Shade of Reflection [Ambuscade]
dataList.desc:
- The Identities' Attack Skills that are <color=#f8c200>Gluttony</color> Skills or Skills that inflict <color=#f8c200>Rupture</color> deal +25% damage (for E.G.O Skills, deal +100% damage instead)
- <color=#f8c200>H Corp.</color> Identities deal +15% damage and take -30% damage
- Combat Start: Upon <color=#f8c200>A-Reson.</color>, gain <color=#f8c200>1 least-owned E.G.O resource 4 times</color>
- If the attacker's Speed is faster than Ricardo's when he is <color=#f8c200>Staggered</color>, Ricardo takes <color=#f8c200>+(Speed difference x 2)% damage</color> (max 20%)

dataList.name: Tribulation
dataList.desc:

- Skills deal +20% damage
- [Phase 2 Exclusive Effect]
 · Ricardo and his Siblings' SP do not fall below 0
 · Turn Start: Inflict 2 "Written in the Book" on all enemies that attacked Ricardo in the previous turn

dataList.name: Written in the Book
dataList.desc:
Max Stack: 30
Take +3% damage for every Stack

dataList.name: Vengeance Tattoo
dataList.desc:
Max Stack: 300
Skills gain Offense Level +1 for every 10 Stack

dataList.name: Test of the Big Brother
dataList.desc:
Turn End: Lose 1 Stack
While this effect is active, double damage taken from Skills, and double the amount of Stagger threshold raised from Tremor Burst

dataList.name: Shade of Reflection [Bearhunt]
dataList.desc:
- The Identities' Attack Skills that are Wrath Skills or Skills that inflict Burn or 'Unique Burn' deal +25% damage (for E.G.O Skills, deal +100% damage instead)
- When raising Stagger threshold via Tremor Burst against enemy Shield, deal Wrath damage instead
· When dealing Wrath damage via the above effect, deal +50% damage against Shield (rounded down)
- Upon Reson., gain 1 random least-owned E.G.O resource and 1 E.G.O resource of the Affinity used for Reson. (2 times per turn)
dataList.summary: Burn Skills and 'Unique Burn' Skills deal more damage; raising Stagger threshold deals Wrath damage

dataList.name: Shade of Reflection [Bearhunt]
dataList.desc: - Shield takes +50% damage from Burn and 'Unique Burn' (rounded down)

dataList.name: Shade of Reflection [Tigerhunt]
dataList.desc:
- The Identities' Attack Skills that are Pride Skills, or Attack Skills that apply, gain, or consume Poise deal +25% damage (for E.G.O Skills, deal +100% damage instead)
- When using Pride Skills, gain (Skill's Rank) Poise Potency and +2 Poise Count (2 times per turn per Sinner; E.G.O Skills are considered Skill 3 for this purpose)
- For Blade Lineage Identities, apply the following effects:
· Remove this unit's first Stagger Threshold
· Final Power +2
· Deal +30% damage to and take -15% damage from enemies
dataList.summary: Poise Skills and Pride Skills deal more damage; gain Poise when using Pride Skills

dataList.name: Tribulation
dataList.desc:
- Max HP +25%
- SP does not drop below 0
- [Im Gyeong-eop Exclusive Effect] When using "Sword of the Homeland [Sal] - Reassume Stance" and "Sword of the Homeland [Sal] - Swordhoning", if this unit is at 5 or fewer Poise Count, gain +2 Poise Count

dataList.name: Tribulation
dataList.desc:
- Max HP +25%
- SP does not drop below 0
- [Im Gyeong-eop Exclusive Effect] When using "Sword of the Homeland [Sal] - Reassume Stance" and "Sword of the Homeland [Sal] - Swordhoning", if this unit is at 5 or fewer Poise Count, gain +2 Poise Count
- [Phase 2 Exclusive Effect] When Swordplay of the Homeland [Sal] resets to 5 due to the effects of "Swordplay of the Homeland [Sal] - Shift Battleform" Passive, gain or lose 2 Swordplay of the Homeland [Sal] Stack based on Battleform of the Homeland on self
· When in Battleform of the Homeland - Bearhunt: Gain Stack
· When in Battleform of the Homeland - Tigerhunt: Lose Stack

dataList.name: Shade of Reflection [Bearhunt]
dataList.desc:
- The Identities' Attack Skills that are <color=#f8c200>Wrath Skills or Skills that inflict Burn or 'Unique Burn'</color> deal +25% damage (for E.G.O Skills, deal +100% damage instead)
- When raising Stagger threshold via <color=#f8c200>Tremor Burst</color> against enemy Shield, deal <color=#f8c200>Wrath damage</color> instead
· When dealing <color=#f8c200>Wrath damage</color> via the above effect against target, or when target takes <color=#f8c200>Burn or 'Unique Burn'</color> damage, target's <color=#f8c200>Shield</color> takes +50% damage (rounded down)
- Upon Reson., gain 1 random least-owned E.G.O resource and 1 E.G.O resource of the Affinity used for Reson. (2 times per turn)
